column1: id;name;source;type;tags;steps
TC-VHYYHT;Assign a list of specific serial numbers using comma notation;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/trackable/#assign-serial-numbers;positive;tracking
column2: assign-serial-numbers;"Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as Trackable

column1: Given a user with stock create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new stock item for 'Sensor Module' with quantity 3 and enters '1
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock tab for 'Sensor Module' shows 3 stock items with serial numbers 1
TC-1LN3YZ;Assign serial numbers using tilde notation for next available serial number;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/trackable/#assign-serial-numbers;positive;tracking
column3: serial-next;"Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as Trackable and the next available serial number is 8

column1: Given a user with stock create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new stock item for 'Sensor Module' and enters '~' in the serial number field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock tab for 'Sensor Module' shows a new stock item with serial number 8"
TC-B1PMZB;Assign a range of serial numbers using dash notation;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/trackable/#assign-serial-numbers;positive;tracking
column3: serial-range;"Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as Trackable

column1: Given a user with stock create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new stock item for 'Sensor Module' with quantity 5 and enters '1-5' in the serial number field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock tab for 'Sensor Module' shows 5 individual stock items with serial numbers 1
TC-LVHENP;Assign serial numbers using start-plus notation for consecutive range;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/trackable/#assign-serial-numbers;positive;tracking
column3: serial-range;"Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as Trackable

column1: Given a user with stock create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new stock item for 'Sensor Module' with quantity 3 and enters '4+' in the serial number field (with 3 numbers needed)
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock tab for 'Sensor Module' shows 3 stock items with serial numbers 4
TC-1SF2G9;Assign a single serial number to a trackable stock item;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/trackable/#assign-serial-numbers;positive;tracking
column2: assign-serial-numbers;"Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as Trackable

column1: Given a user with stock create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new stock item for 'Sensor Module' and enters '42' in the serial number field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock tab for 'Sensor Module' shows a stock item with serial number '42'"
